units.title: Capacitor and Dielectric
sub_topics: Capacitor: Introduction, Types, Charging and discharging

units.title: Electromagnetism

Normalized wave function describing the motion of an electron inside an infinite potential well

units.title: Fundamentals of Thermodynamics and Heat Transfer

units.title: Matrix and System of linear equations
sub_topics: System of linear equations, classification, matrix and vector representations, solution by Cramer's and Gauss elimination methods

units.title: Vector Space

Cayley-Hamilton theorem (statement and verification only), application to compute inverse of a matrix (up to 3×3)
Similar matrices and diagonalization of matrix (up to 2×2 matrices only)

units.title: Linear Programming Problems
sub_topics: Introduction, Model Formulation, Standard Form, Solution by Simplex Method

units.title: Two-dimensional Geometry
sub_topics: Transformation of coordinates: by translation, by rotation, combined transformation, use to reduce complex equations

units.title: Three-dimensional Geometry
sub_topics: Review coordinate in space and plane

Straight line: symmetrical form, line through two points, reduction of general equation, angle between plane and line, conditions for a line to lie on a plane, length of perpendicular, coplanar lines, condition for intersection, shortest distance
Sphere: Equation, condition for general equation to represent a sphere, diameter form, plane section, circle as intersection, intersection of two spheres, tangent plane, condition of tangency
Cone: Equation with given vertex and generator intersecting given conic, right circular cone
Cylinder: Equation whose generator intersects a given conic and is parallel to a given line, right circular cylinder

units.title: Stack and Recursion

Recursion: Problem Solving Technique, Principle of Recursion, Recursive Algorithms (GCD, Sum of Natural Numbers, Factorial, Fibonacci Series, Tower of Hanoi), Recursion and Stack, Recursion vs Iteration, Recursive Data Structures, Types and Applications of Recursion

units.title: Queue and Linked List
sub_topics: Queue: Definition, Operations, Queue ADT and Array Implementation, Circular Queue, Double Ended Queue and Priority Queue

units.title: Tree
sub_topics: General Trees: Definition, Applications, Game Tree

Binary Search Tree: Definition, Operations (insertion, deletion, searching, traversing), Construction
Balanced Binary Tree: Problem with unbalanced trees, Balanced Binary Search Tree

B Tree: Definition, Need and Application
